content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.researchgate.net/figure/Electrochemical-properties-of-catalysts-a-Faradaic-efficiencies-for-C2H4-on-the-three_fig4_375497401", "source_title": "Electrochemical properties of catalysts. a) Faradaic ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "---Source URL: https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsami.7b16164\nSource title: Preferentially Oriented Ag Nanocrystals with Extremely High Act...", "direct_quote": "---Source URL: https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsami.7b16164\nSource title: Preferentially Oriented Ag Nanocrystals with Extremely High Activity ...", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The PON-Ag catalyst was dominated by (110) and (100) orientation, which allowed PON-Ag to achieve a CO Faradaic efficiency of 96.7% at an op...", "direct_quote": "The PON-Ag catalyst was dominated by (110) and (100) orientation, which allowed PON-Ag to achieve a CO Faradaic efficiency of 96.7% at an operating potential of \u22120.69 V vs RHE.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "This performance is not only significantly higher than that of polycrystalline Ag (60% at \u22120.87 V vs RHE) but also represents one of the bes...", "direct_quote": "This performance is not only significantly higher than that of polycrystalline Ag (60% at \u22120.87 V vs RHE) but also represents one of the best combinations of activity and selectivity achieved to date - all with a very simple, scalable approach to ele", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
